creator: kp@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Zhenlei Huang from comment #32)
Remember to 'git cherry-pick -x' so there's a `(cherry picked from commit 8707cb19e68128c181477d87f960182c14e15f12)` line, and you'll have to git commit --amend to add the 'Approved by: kp (mentor)' line.

Other than that, go for it.
